calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court ruled as follows: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
of Defendant Nateen H. Ravare is Granted. The Sheriff is not holding any money. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
The matter is called three times. No appearances. The Court rules as follows: Judgment Debtor Nateena H. Ravare's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Granted. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the Judgment debtor. Order is signed in Open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/hk)

Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
